name: @leon-llb/openclaw-upgrade
description: Upgrade kit that brings layered memory, workflow gates, and progressive agent profiles to OpenClaw.

scripts.build: npm run build:cli && npm run build:local-memory
scripts.build:cli: rm -rf dist && npx -y -p typescript@5.9.3 tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: npx -y -p typescript@5.9.3 tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && npm --prefix packages/local-memory run typecheck
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test tests/*.test.cjs && npm --prefix packages/local-memory run test

author: Leon
